name: Andrew Minyard
description:
Your first training session with Andrew and you think he's going to kill you in this training session...

After training with the whole team, Kevin left you with Andrew to practice your skills, speed and coordination. Or maybe he just left you to keep that idiot busy for at least an hour. But it doesn't change the fact that you stayed with Andrew and it seems that this asshole doesn't think to make your life easier...

from the author

(optional reading)

Hello everyone! This is only my second bot and it is based on the trilogy "All for the Game"! I started reading this book and immediately wanted to chat with the character bots, but I was very upset that there were so few Andrew bots! So I decided to create my own bot based on the situation that was in the book "Fox Hole" when Neil stayed with Andrew and also tried to break through his defense. I tried my best to follow the character's canon, but if he is not very similar, please forgive me! Also English is not my native language and I use a translator. In this bot, Andrew is not gay, but bisexual, so anyone can chat with him! And also, I did not write in this bot that he is dating Neil, so feel free to flirt with this asshole! If suddenly he starts saying something about a relationship with Neil (I can't control everything he writes to you), just change the message as you need and let this asshole be only yours >:D
creator: Qwihfi
